mapper.sql: select r.result_id, r.competition_id, r.team_id, r.user_id, r.project_name, r.award_level, r.ranking, r.score, r.certificate_url, r.certificate_hash, r.result_status, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.audit_by, r.audit_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, r.del_flag from competition_result r

select r.result_id, r.competition_id, r.team_id, r.user_id, r.project_name, r.award_level, r.ranking, r.score, r.certificate_url, r.certificate_hash, r.result_status, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.audit_by, r.audit_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, r.del_flag, c.competition_name, t.team_name, u.user_name from competition_result r left join competition c on r.competition_id = c.competition_id left join comp_team t on r.team_id = t.team_id left join sys_user u on r.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.select: where r.result_id = #{resultId} and r.del_flag = '0' and r.result_status = '1'

where r.del_flag = '0' and r.result_status = '1'
AND c.competition_name like concat('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
AND r.award_level = #{awardLevel}
AND r.project_name like concat('%', #{projectName}, '%')
order by r.create_time desc

where r.del_flag = '0'
AND r.result_status = #{resultStatus}
AND c.competition_name like concat('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
order by r.create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into competition_result ( competition_id, team_id, user_id, project_name, award_level, ranking, score, certificate_url, certificate_hash, result_status, create_by, create_time, del_flag ) values ( #{competitionId}, #{teamId}, #{userId}, #{projectName}, #{awardLevel}, #{ranking}, #{score}, #{certificateUrl}, #{certificateHash}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), '0' )
mapper.update:
update competition_result
project_name = #{projectName}, award_level = #{awardLevel}, ranking = #{ranking}, score = #{score}, certificate_url = #{certificateUrl}, certificate_hash = #{certificateHash}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate()
where result_id = #{resultId} and del_flag = '0' and result_status != '1'

update competition_result set result_status = #{resultStatus}, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, update_time = sysdate() ,remark = #{remark} where result_id = #{resultId} and del_flag = '0' and result_status = '0'
